input.background: We propose to draw boxplots for the air sample data presented in prior illustrations (see Table 4.2).
input.question: For site 2, calculate the interquartile range (IQR) and determine the fences for outliers. Are there any outliers?

output.answer: $\mathrm{IQR}=38.5-33.5=5$. Fence $_{\text {Lower }}=33.5-(1.5)(5)=26$. Fence $_{\text {Upper }}=38.5+(1.5)(5)=46$. There are no outside values in this group.
